title: erigeron cochinchinensis
intro: Erigeron cochinchinensis, also known as Vietnamese fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer properties. Erigeron cochinchinensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in modern medicine as a raw material for the production of pharmaceuticals.
